The '''Stereb''' were the tall, primitive natives of [[Serroco]]. They built the [[Stereb cities]] and had low technology.

==Behind the scenes==
[[John Jackson Miller]] has said that he instructed [[Brian Ching]] to draw the Stereb as "big hairless [[Wookiee/Legends|wookiee]] guys [''sic'']."<ref>{{Faraway|url=ComicsbyJJM/StarWarsKnightsoftheOldRepublic/2007issues/KnightsoftheOldRepublic14/tabid/119/Default.aspx|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #14}}</ref>
